metadata.target_user: Busy fathers — 4 sessions per week, 45–60 minutes per session

days.title: Full Body A — Upper Strength + Lower Power
Full Body B — Lower Strength + Upper Power

global_rules.quick_mode_rule: When time is limited, keep prep shortened, complete power and primary strength first, then one accessory superset only.
global_rules.day3_rest_rule: Day 3 is mandatory rest. No makeup sessions. Active recovery (walk, breathe, mobility) only if needed.

source_days_merged.4day_day1: 6-day Day 1 (upper strength) + 6-day Day 5 lower hypertrophy absorbed into secondary block
source_days_merged.4day_day4: 6-day Day 4 (athletic/lateral) + 6-day Day 2 sprint work + 6-day Day 6 arms/shoulder health
source_days_merged.4day_day5: 6-day Day 5 upper hypertrophy + delt/calf volume + structural balance

conversion_notes.volume_adjustments: Accessory sets trimmed 1 set per exercise where needed to fit 60-min cap. Athletic intervals reduced by 2 rounds on Day 4 to accommodate arms. Zone 2 moved to optional Day 4 cooldown.
what_was_preserved: All primary barbell movements (bench, squat, RDL, BOR)
Power work every session that has a strength day (jumps, med ball)
Lateral + rotational athletic work on Day 4
Full arm training block (EZ curl, rope pushdown, hammer, OHT extension)
Shoulder health (scapular, serratus, external rotation) distributed across 4 days
Weekly undulating wave on M3 primary lifts
All 3 planes of motion covered weekly
what_was_reduced: Zone 2 conditioning: 25 min dedicated session → 10-15 min optional cooldown on Day 4
Assault Bike intervals: reduced by 2 rounds to accommodate arm block
Some accessory sets trimmed by 1 to fit 60-min cap
Overhead Press reduced to 3x10 secondary slot (from 3x10 dedicated on Day 3)

progression_engine.week_1: Establish baseline loads. Leave 2-3 RIR unless otherwise noted.
progression_engine.week_2: Add 1 rep per set where prescribed or 2.5-5 lb upper / 5-10 lb lower if all sets met.
progression_engine.week_3: Push load progression while keeping target RIR.
progression_engine.week_4: Deload week. Reduce volume 30-40%. Keep bar speed high.

readiness_rules.low_sleep_under_6_hours: Remove one accessory set from each later block. Keep all lifts 1 RIR easier.
readiness_rules.joint_irritation: Swap offensive movement for listed substitution. Avoid intensity techniques.
readiness_rules.time_crunch_under_40_minutes: Use quick_mode: power block + primary strength only. Skip accessories.

days.label: Full Body A
days.notes: Squat appears here as secondary (3x6) — conservative loading after bench. Primary squat expression is Day 2.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Set shoulder position. Retract at end.

exercises.name: Box Breathing
exercises.notes: Arrive and focus. 4-4-4-4 pattern.

blocks.notes: Sagittal plane power. Max distance, not max volume.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.notes: Max horizontal distance. Full reset each rep. Land soft.

blocks.notes: Bench is the primary expression. BOR paired for efficiency.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Strong and smooth. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.notes: Full retraction at top. Hinge maintained throughout.

blocks.notes: Squat as secondary lift — conservative loading. Primary squat day is Day 2.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 3 sets only — follows heavy pressing. Bar speed over load. Deload 10-15% from Day 2 working weight.
exercises.substitution: Goblet Squat if spine is fatigued from bench setup

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: Upper chest and push volume balance.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Scapular retraction. Pulls pull:push ratio above 1.3.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health. External rotation at end range. Never skip.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Reach long at top. Serratus activation.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring volume — was deficient at 6 sets (target 10-14). Paired with squat day accessories.

days.label: Full Body B
days.notes: Primary squat expression. Med ball throws cover transverse plane.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
exercises.notes: Full hip internal and external rotation range.

exercises.name: Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Reach long at top. Shoulder prep before med ball.

blocks.notes: Transverse plane power — covers rotation requirement for the week.

exercises.name: Rotational Med Ball Throw
exercises.notes: Max rotational velocity. Full reset each rep. Hip drives the throw, not the arm.

blocks.notes: Primary squat day. Full 4x5. RDL as primary hinge.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Primary squat expression this week. Load heavier than Day 1 secondary squat.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hip hinge — feel hamstrings load. Do not round lower back.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Rear foot elevated. Front shin vertical. Fixes bilateral lower dominance.
exercises.substitution: DB Reverse Lunge if Bulgarian causes knee discomfort

exercises.name: DB Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Frontal delt and push volume balance. Seated or standing.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Back volume. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Quad isolation — addresses quad volume deficit.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Shoulder health floor. Elbow at 90 degrees.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.notes: ADDED: core/anti-lateral flexion — fills core gap, frontal plane core component.

days.label: Rest
days.notes: Mandatory full rest. Walk if you want. Do not train. This is where adaptation happens.

days.label: Athletic + Hypertrophy + Arms
days.notes: Merged: 6-day Day 4 (athletic/lateral) + 6-day Day 2 (sprint/speed) + 6-day Day 6 (arms/shoulder health). Athletic block first — never arms before sprints. Sprint volume 4x in M1 (returns to 5x M2+). Woodchop at 2 sets on D4. Optional cooldown not counted in cap.

exercises.name: Leg Swing
exercises.notes: Sagittal then frontal. Hip prep for sprints and bounds.

exercises.name: A-Skip
exercises.notes: Mechanics cue. Dorsiflexion and cycle.

blocks.notes: Sagittal plane. Full acceleration intent. Full rest between reps.

exercises.name: 20 Yard Build-Up Sprint
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 5x to 4x in M1 — fits 60-min cap on merged Day 4. Returns to 5x in M2.

blocks.notes: Frontal + transverse planes. Covers all 3 planes for the week with sprints.

exercises.name: Lateral Bound
exercises.notes: Reactive landing — stick it. Full hip extension at takeoff.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.notes: Rotational strength. Hips lead, arms follow.

blocks.notes: Reduced from 8x to 6x vs 6-day to protect arm quality at end of session.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Intervals
exercises.notes: Max output each interval. If output drops >15% from set 1, rest an extra round.

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
exercises.notes: REDUCED from 3 to 2 sets on D4 — cable woodchop coverage maintained on D4+D5 combined.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Breathe out on the way down. Lumbar stays neutral.

blocks.notes: Merged from 6-day Day 6. Arms after conditioning — CNS demand is low, pump is high.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Bicep primary. Elbows stay fixed.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: Tricep primary. Flare at bottom.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Brachialis and forearm.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Long-head emphasis.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Side delt. Slight forward lean. Lead with elbow.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Shoulder health. Do not rush.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring volume supplement. Pump-focused at end of session.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: ADDED: calf volume — was only 4 sets on D5 (target 8-12). Split across D4 and D5.

blocks.notes: Optional only — adds 8-10 min if session ran under 55 min. Not included in session cap.

exercises.name: Easy Bike or Walk
exercises.notes: Zone 1 only. Flush legs. Not conditioning.

days.label: Full Body Hypertrophy
days.notes: Merged from 6-day Day 5. Upper + lower hypertrophy with delt and calf work. Tension-based — slow tempos, full range.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Spinal mobility. Slow and deliberate.

exercises.name: Y-T-W Raise
exercises.notes: Scapular activation. Movement quality — not load.

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.notes: Full range. Touch chest. Chest hypertrophy.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Scapular retraction at top. Back hypertrophy.

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: ADDED: chest volume — was at 10 sets (target 12-16). Upper chest support on pump day.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Quad isolation. Hold at top for 1 sec.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Hamstring isolation. Slow eccentric.

blocks.notes: Delt and calf volume block. High rep, pump-focused.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Side delt priority. 5 sets — highest volume item in hypertrophy day.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: REDUCED to 2 sets — 4 sets added to D4. Total weekly calves = 6 sets minimum across both days.

blocks.notes: Shoulder health always closes Day 5.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: External rotation at end range.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Reach long at top.

blocks.notes: Face Pull moved to prep as daily shoulder primer — quality only, no load chase.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Set shoulder position.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder primer. Movement quality only — no RIR target.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.notes: Beat M1 distance. Full intent each rep.

blocks.notes: Weighted Pull-Up promoted to primary. Bench restructured to 4 total sets.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 1 top set + 3 backoffs. Paused reps Week 6.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Primary vertical pull. Conservative load Week 5, progress weekly.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Secondary squat slot — 10-15% below Day 2 working weight. 3 sets only.

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: Push:pull balance. Upper chest.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Scapular. Back volume support.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Shoulder health floor.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring volume supplement. Heavier than M1.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
exercises.notes: Quick prep.

exercises.name: Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Quick reach.

exercises.name: Rotational Med Ball Throw
exercises.notes: More intent than M1. Full hip rotation.

blocks.notes: Squat gets top set structure. BOR gets honest spotlight after lower body.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Primary squat day. 1 top set + 3 backoffs. Paused reps Week 6.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.notes: Horizontal pull. Gets fresh CNS after lower body, not stacked behind bench.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1. Critical unilateral work.
exercises.substitution: DB Reverse Lunge if knee irritation

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Posterior chain support.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Back volume maintenance.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Serratus health.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.notes: ADDED: lateral core. Slightly longer hold than M1.

exercises.name: Leg Swing
exercises.notes: Quick hip prep.

exercises.name: A-Skip
exercises.notes: Mechanics cue.

exercises.name: 30 Yard Build-Up Sprint
exercises.notes: Slightly longer distance than M1. Controlled build.

exercises.name: Lateral Bound
exercises.notes: Reduced from M1 — protects strength recovery.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Intervals
exercises.notes: Correctly reduced from M1 8x. Strength-bias meso — protect recovery.

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
exercises.notes: Quality reps.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Trunk control.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Brachialis.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Long-head emphasis.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: M2 delt volume.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Shoulder health floor.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring supplement.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: ADDED: calf volume split from D5.

days.label: Full Body Hypertrophy
days.notes: Reduced vs M1 hypertrophy day — strength-bias meso keeps hypertrophy as support.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Quick prep.

exercises.name: Y-T-W Raise
exercises.notes: Shoulder activation.

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1 hypertrophy.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Heavier than M1.

exercises.name: DB Incline Press

exercises.name: Leg Extension

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide

mesocycles.rir_target: SEE_WEEKLY_WAVE on primary lifts. RIR 2-3 on accessories.

week_9.notes: Re-establish bar speed with slightly higher rep — feel the weight move fast.

week_10.notes: Heavy triples — this is the money week for CNS peak.

week_11.notes: Near-max effort. Cluster sets optional on the double.

week_12.notes: Peak expression. Treat this as a test. Leave nothing.

days.label: Full Body A
days.notes: Depth Jump to Broad Jump replaces Broad Jump — reactive strength peaks. Bench follows weekly undulating wave.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Quick setup.

exercises.name: Pogo Hop
exercises.notes: Elastic prep. Feel the spring.

blocks.notes: 3x2 — maximal reactive intent. Fewer reps, higher quality than M1/M2.

exercises.name: Depth Jump to Broad Jump
exercises.notes: Step off box — do not jump off. Absorb and explode immediately. Max horizontal distance. If landing is off, full reset before next rep.

blocks.notes: Bench follows weekly undulating wave. See meso weekly_strength_wave for sets/reps/RIR by week.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: W9:3x4@RIR1 | W10:3x3@RIR0-1 | W11:2x3+1x2@RIR0 | W12:1x2+1x1 peak. Bar speed is the signal — every rep must look fast.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.notes: Explosive concentric — snap the bar to the body.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Secondary slot — 10-15% below Day 2 working weight. 3 sets. Bar speed focus.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health non-negotiable during performance phase.

exercises.name: DB Incline Press
exercises.notes: Minimum effective push volume. Moderate load — not a performance set.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: Shoulder health. Most important during max-intensity meso.

days.label: Full Body B
days.notes: Med Ball Shot Put replaces Rotational Throw — more horizontal power expression. Squat follows weekly wave.

exercises.name: 90/90 Hip Switch
exercises.notes: Quick hip prep.

exercises.name: Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Shoulder prep.

blocks.notes: Med Ball Shot Put — horizontal rotational expression. More max-velocity intent than M2 throw.

exercises.name: Med Ball Shot Put
exercises.notes: Max velocity each throw. Full reset between reps. Hip leads, arm follows.

blocks.notes: Squat follows weekly undulating wave. Primary lower expression.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: W9:3x4@RIR1 | W10:3x3@RIR0-1 | W11:2x3+1x2@RIR0 | W12:1x2+1x1 peak. Position over load always.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Heavy hinge. Explosive concentric.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Pull volume maintenance.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Keep hamstrings responsive.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: Serratus — restored to 3 sets during max intensity phase.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring maintenance volume.

days.label: Athletic + Hypertrophy + Arms
days.notes: Performance meso — sprints are true acceleration sprints now, not build-ups. Intervals kept sharp: 8x15s/45s.

exercises.name: A-Skip
exercises.notes: Quick rhythm before acceleration work.

blocks.notes: True acceleration sprints — not build-ups. Full intent from stance.

exercises.name: 20 Yard Acceleration Sprint
exercises.notes: Full intent. Drive phase — first 10 yards are everything. Full rest. No sloppy reps.

exercises.name: Lateral Bound
exercises.notes: Reactive and controlled. Quality of landing = quality of training.

exercises.name: Landmine Rotation
exercises.notes: Fast concentric. Own the rotation.

blocks.notes: Reduced to 8x15s/45s — 1:3 work:rest preserved. Day 4 was the highest set-count day in original M3. Corrected here.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Intervals
exercises.notes: Max output each interval. If output drops, rest an extra round.

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
exercises.notes: Fast quality reps.

blocks.notes: Performance meso — arms at maintenance. Shoulder health at full 6 sets. This is when you need it most.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Minimum arm maintenance.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: Minimum arm maintenance.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Delt maintenance.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation
exercises.notes: RESTORED to 3 sets. Shoulder health is most critical during max intensity phase.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slide
exercises.notes: RESTORED to 3 sets. Reach long at top.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: ADDED: hamstring maintenance.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: ADDED: calf maintenance.

days.label: Full Body Hypertrophy
days.notes: Minimum effective dose in performance meso. RIR targets restored on all exercises.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.notes: Very brief prep.

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.notes: Maintenance. RIR 2-3 — do not chase load.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Row
exercises.notes: Maintenance.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Quad maintenance.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Hamstring maintenance.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Delt maintenance.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Calf maintenance.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health. Performance meso — never skip.
